---
title: "test_install_skill_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_install_skill_empire.py"
loc: 15
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.40
style_score: 3.60
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.23
---

## Intent
The `test_install_skill_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_sanitize_skill_name, test_get_config. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_sanitize_skill_name, test_get_config. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [src.skills.install_skill](file://src.skills.install_skill)

### Exports
- `test_sanitize_skill_name`
- `test_get_config`
